global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with geometric shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings and flexible booking options.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large square and an oval shape are centered, overlapping slightly, creating a modern abstract design.

elements.label: Additional geometric shapes
elements.description: A smaller square and two circles are arranged in a visually appealing manner, enhancing the abstract theme.

elements.label: CloudRoute logo
elements.description: The text 'CloudRoute' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font, conveying brand identity.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Try for free' is centered at the bottom, designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: The text 'Flexible booking options' is presented in a smaller font beneath the main message, providing additional information.

elements.label: Last-minute savings message
elements.description: The phrase 'Last-minute savings' is prominently displayed in bold, eye-catching text, emphasizing urgency.

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free' encourages immediate engagement.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' is positioned at the top left, reinforcing brand recognition.

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: A small badge with the word 'SALE' is placed at the top right, drawing attention to promotional offers.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main subjects are centered, and CTAs are at the bottom.
